title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入比利时：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入比利時：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage documentation against Belgium (NBN / CREG / Elia) requirements for EU CE framework compliance (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU, and Battery Regulation 2023/1542), transport, safety, grid interconnection, and destination-country due-diligence expectations, with Antwerp and Zeebrugge as the main ports. Regional electricity regulators (VREG for Flanders, CWaPE for Wallonia, BRUGEL for Brussels) supplement CREG federal oversight.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与比利时（NBN / CREG / Elia）基于欧盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及欧盟电池法规2023/1542）、运输、安全、并网和尽责管理要求的差距对照，安特卫普和泽布吕赫为主要入境港。区域电力监管机构（弗兰德的VREG、瓦隆的CWaPE、布鲁塞尔的BRUGEL）补充CREG联邦层面的监管。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與比利時（NBN / CREG / Elia）基於歐盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及歐盟電池法規2023/1542）、運輸、安全、併網和盡責管理要求的差距對照，安特衛普和澤布呂赫為主要入境港。區域電力監管機構（法蘭德斯的VREG、瓦隆的CWaPE、布魯塞爾的BRUGEL）補充CREG聯邦層面的監管。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Belgium (NBN / CREG / Elia) requirements, EU CE directives, grid requirements, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、危险货物分类、海关裁定、并网审批或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行比利时（NBN / CREG / Elia）及欧盟相关法规的要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、危險貨物分類、海關裁定、併網核准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行比利時（NBN / CREG / Elia）及歐盟相關法規的要求。

answer_first.en: For Belgium, the practical entry barriers are mainly EU CE conformity execution (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU where applicable, plus Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 lifecycle and due-diligence duties), CREG/Elia grid-interconnection documentation, regional regulator alignment (VREG/CWaPE/BRUGEL), and NBN/market-acceptance alignment. EU membership makes this a harmonised-framework-first market, with 230/400 V 50 Hz utility conditions, Dutch and French-language documentation often expected, and Antwerp/Zeebrugge as the principal import gateways.
answer_first.zh: 对于比利时，主要入门门槛是执行欧盟CE合规路径（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要时RED 2014/53/EU，以及欧盟电池法规2023/1542的生命周期与尽责管理义务）、CREG/Elia并网文件要求、区域监管机构（VREG/CWaPE/BRUGEL）对齐，以及与NBN和市场验收的衔接。该市场以欧盟协调框架为主，电网名义电压为230/400 V、50 Hz，通常需要荷语和法语文件，且安特卫普/泽布吕赫是主要入境口岸。
answer_first.zht: 對於比利時，主要入門門檻是執行歐盟CE合規路徑（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要時RED 2014/53/EU，以及歐盟電池法規2023/1542之生命周期與盡責管理義務）、CREG/Elia併網文件要求、區域監管機構（VREG/CWaPE/BRUGEL）對齊，以及與NBN和市場驗收接軌。該市場以歐盟協調框架為主，電網名義電壓為230/400 V、50 Hz，通常需要荷語和法語文件，且安特衛普/澤布呂赫為主要入境口岸。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
